sessions.title: Security Hardening
planned_tasks: Enable CSRF middleware — fix httponly bug, wire frontend interceptor (4A)
Fix 8 raw fetch() calls needing manual CSRF token injection
Complete tenant isolation pattern — fix 2 remaining violations (4C)
Fix TenantManager._validation_cache test coupling (4F)
tasks_completed: CSRF: Fixed httponly/secure bugs, added exempt_prefixes + API key bypass, fixed Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware ExceptionGroup bug (JSONResponse instead of HTTPException), enabled in app.py with comprehensive exemptions
CSRF: Wired Axios request interceptor for automatic CSRF header injection on state-changing requests
CSRF: Fixed SystemSettings.vue raw fetch() PATCH call with CSRF token; 5 other raw fetch() calls exempt by path prefix
CSRF: Updated all 4 test auth fixtures (auth_headers, auth_headers_tenant_a/b, authenticated_client) with CSRF double-submit tokens
CSRF: 12 new integration tests covering block/allow/mismatch/safe-methods/exempt-paths/api-key-bypass/cookie-behavior
Tenant isolation: Added tenant_key filter to AgentJob lookup in simple_handover.py
Tenant isolation: Replaced db.get(Project) with tenant-scoped select() in orchestration.py
TenantManager: Added register_test_tenant() classmethod, replaced 3 direct _validation_cache accesses in smoke conftest
deviations: Only 1 of 8 raw fetch() calls needed manual CSRF fix — 7 others exempt by path prefix (auth, setup, mcp-installer, download)
Discovered and fixed Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware bug: raise HTTPException wraps in ExceptionGroup -> 500; replaced with return JSONResponse
blockers_encountered: Pre-commit ruff-format and mixed-line-ending hooks required re-staging on first CSRF commit
sessions.notes_for_next: All security hardening complete. CSRF enabled with 12 tests. 2 tenant isolation fixes applied. TenantManager test coupling eliminated. 1422 tests passing (12 new CSRF), 342 skipped. Frontend builds clean. Branch ready for 0765g (Tenant Key + Encapsulation).
sessions.summary: Enabled CSRF double-submit cookie protection across full stack: fixed 3 middleware bugs (httponly, secure, Starlette ExceptionGroup), wired Axios interceptor + raw fetch fix, configured comprehensive exemptions. Fixed 2 tenant isolation pattern violations (defense-in-depth). Added TenantManager.register_test_tenant() to eliminate test coupling. 3 commits, 12 new tests, 1422 total passing.

sessions.title: Tenant Key + Encapsulation
planned_tasks: Remove hardcoded default tenant key from 10 locations — config-based resolution (4B)
Fix prompts endpoint encapsulation — add public API methods (4D)
Refactor update_project — extract DTO construction and broadcast (4E)
tasks_completed: Task 1: Removed 14+ hardcoded tenant key occurrences from backend (dependencies, auth middleware, auth endpoint, config endpoint), frontend (api.js, api service, McpIntegration), and both installers. Config-based resolution via ConfigManager.tenant.default_tenant_key.
Task 2: Added generate_implementation_prompt() public method to ThinClientPromptGenerator, replacing direct private _build_* method calls from prompts API endpoint.
Task 3: Extracted _apply_project_updates() and _build_project_data() helpers from update_project, with 19 new unit tests.
deviations: Task 3 subagent committed with 'test:' and 'refactor:' prefixes instead of 'cleanup(0765g):' convention
RegisterUserRequest.tenant_key default changed from hardcoded to None (field was unused by both endpoint handlers)
blockers_encountered: Pre-commit ruff-format and mixed-line-ending hooks required re-staging on both Task 1 and Task 2 commits
Task 3 subagent had 8 initial test failures due to Pydantic validation on Mock() project_type — fixed with proper mock fields
sessions.notes_for_next: All 3 tasks complete. 1441 tests passing (19 new), 342 skipped. Frontend builds clean. Zero hardcoded tenant keys remain. Branch ready for 0765h (Skipped Test Resolution).
sessions.summary: Removed all hardcoded tenant keys across 11 files via config-based resolution. Encapsulated prompt generation behind public API. Extracted 2 helpers from update_project with 19 tests. 4 commits total.

sessions.summary: Independent quality audit scored codebase 8.2/10 across 10 dimensions. Found 3 SECURITY tenant isolation gaps, 1 HIGH SQLAlchemy bug, significant dead code (2 files + 55 test fixtures + 11 dead store exports), and frontend color system fragmentation. Exception handling scored perfect 10/10. Sprint improved codebase from 7.8 to 8.2 through ~2,500 lines dead code removal, CSRF enablement, design token migration, and 342 skipped test resolution.

sessions.title: Design System Sample Page
planned_tasks: Research Vuetify theme config and design tokens
Extract component patterns (buttons, cards, badges, typography)
Build self-contained HTML sample page with dark theme
Cross-reference with branding guide, document discrepancies
tasks_completed: Researched 8 frontend config files (theme.js, main.scss, design-tokens.scss, agent-colors.scss, variables.scss, agentColors.js, statusConfig.js, global-tabs.scss) extracting all design tokens
Researched 6 Vue components (App.vue, ProjectTabs, JobsTab, AgentJobModal, LaunchTab, NavigationDrawer) extracting button/card/chip/typography patterns

Built 1605-line self-contained HTML sample page with 12 sections: layout layers, color palette, interactive elements, agent role colors, status badges (dual systems), typography, spacing/elevation, gradients, AI tool colors, scrollbar styling, discrepancies

Cross-referenced branding guide vs actual config: found 6 discrepancies (agent color mismatches in design-tokens.scss, status color conflicts, font family conflict Cairo vs Roboto, primary text color variance, duplicate radius systems, duplicate shadow systems)
deviations: vuetify.js does not exist — theme lives in config/theme.js (discovered during research)
constants.js does not exist — color palettes live in agentColors.js and variables.scss
Discovered statusConfig.js as additional source of status colors (not listed in handover spec)
sessions.notes_for_next: Design system has significant token duplication: variables.scss and design-tokens.scss define overlapping radius and shadow scales with different values. Status colors fragmented across 3 sources (statusConfig.js, agent-colors.scss CSS vars, design-tokens.scss SCSS vars) with conflicting values. Agent colors in design-tokens.scss diverge from canonical agentColors.js for 3 roles. Font family conflict (Cairo declared in design-tokens, Roboto applied in main.scss).
sessions.summary: Built self-contained dark-theme HTML reference page (1605 lines) documenting the complete GiljoAI MCP design system. Researched 8 config files and 6 Vue components via parallel subagents. Documented all Vuetify theme tokens, CSS custom properties, SCSS variables, agent role colors (6 roles with primary/dark/light triads), dual status color systems, typography scale, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, gradients, and AI tool colors. Identified 6 design system discrepancies between source files.

chain_summary: The 0765 Perfect Score Sprint (11 sessions, 0765a-k) improved code quality from 7.8 to 8.5/10. Sessions 0765a-h executed: dead code purge (2,500+ lines), Tier 3 quick fixes, design token migration, exception narrowing, test file splitting, CSRF hardening, tenant key removal, and 342 skipped tests resolved. Session 0765i independently audited at 8.2/10 with 10-item fix list. Session 0765j remediated all 10 findings. Session 0765k re-audited at 8.5/10, confirming all fixes landed but finding 54 new issues (3 SECURITY, 4 HIGH) the original audit missed. VERDICT: FAIL — not merge-ready until 3 SECURITY items fixed. Final: 1453 tests pass, 0 skips, frontend builds clean.
